description: Choose your starting point: hashtags #️⃣, profiles 😎, search results 🔍 or specific tiktoks 🔗. To try the scraper, just add a hashtag, then indicate how many tiktoks you want extracted in the 💯 Number of videos and hit the ▷ Start button. Here’s a tutorial to help.
